typeLine: Alchemist's Sapphire Flask of the Moray
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Maelström Thirst
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
implicitMods: Item sells for much more to vendors
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
+1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
Minions have 25% increased Attack and Cast Speed
craftedMods:
Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Use a Skill, with a 8 second Cooldown
Spells Triggered this way have 150% more Cost

socketedItems.secDescrText: Consumes a corpse, granting all of your minions the power to block both attacks and spells. The skill consumes other nearby corpses, increasing the duration for each corpse consumed.
explicitMods: Additional 1.00 seconds Base Duration per extra corpse Consumed
Grants Minions +35% Chance to Block Attack Damage
Grants Minions +35% Chance to Block Spell Damage
Grants Minions 4% of Life Regenerated per Second if they have Blocked recently
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants cold resistance to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 52% additional Cold Resistance
You and nearby allies gain 4% additional maximum Cold Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Conjures an icy barrier that chills enemies when they hit you. You drop chilled ground while moving, and take less Fire and Physical damage while stationary.
explicitMods: Buff grants 21% less Physical Damage taken from Hits while stationary
Buff grants 21% less Fire Damage taken from Hits while stationary
Chill Enemy for 0.5 seconds when Hit, reducing their Action Speed by 30%
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

name: Svalinn
explicitMods: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
flavourText: The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. If you are using the Raise Spectre skill there is a chance to spawn spectral corpses matching your most recently raised Spectres. Spectral corpses cannot be interacted with except by Minion skills.
explicitMods: Deals 8.2 Base Chaos Damage per second
Spawned corpses' level matches the area level, up to a maximum of Level 20
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies take 35% increased Damage from Projectile Hits
Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Doryani's Prototype
explicitMods: Armour also applies to Lightning Damage taken from Hits
Lightning Resistance does not affect Lightning Damage taken
Nearby Enemies have Lightning Resistance equal to yours

lost to the ages, now ours to decipher."
- Dominus, High Templar
